title: polygala oxyphylla var. normalis
intro: Polygala oxyphylla var. normalis, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a type of flowering plant in the milkwort family that is commonly found in China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Yuan Zhi include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and respiratory issues, as well as improved cardiovascular health and immune function. Yuan Zhi can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tablet, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
